titlStmt.titl: Mikrocensus 1980, 4. quarter: Sports, Leisure Time, and Domestic Accidents

citation.biblCit: Statistics Austria, 2020, "Mikrocensus 1980, 4. quarter: Sports, Leisure Time, and Domestic Accidents", https://doi.org/10.11587/ZJKBDT, AUSSDA, V1

titlStmt.titl: Mikrocensus 1980, 4. quarter: Sports, Leisure Time, and Domestic Accidents

grantNo.agency: The standard program is commissioned by the Austrian Republic and statutorily regulated

distStmt.distrbtr: The Austrian Social Science Data Archive

contact.affiliation: The Austrian Social Science Data Archive

serStmt.serInfo: The microcensus has been carried out since the 1970s and has been repeatedly adapted to changing circumstances over time. The last major reform took place in 2014.

stdyInfo.abstract: Already in December 1970 (Mikrozensus MZ7004) a Mikrozensus special survey had been conducted on this topic. After ten years this special program is now repeated. Appropriated modifications of the question catalogue were needed. The social- and health care system is still very interested in this accident statistical data since surveys on accidents during sportive activities, recreational time or in the household are neither conducted regularly nor comprehensively (in contrast to traffic- and occupational accidents).

sumDscr.universe: Persons registered in the central register of residents living in private households

stdyInfo.notes:
To access the data, please download the Terms of Use Agreement for Microcensus Data by Statistics Austria, sign it and send it to info@aussda.at.

The data files of the special survey are not ready for use. This means that data need to be transformed from outdated binary file formats into current software formats. Only the basic survey is available

method.notes: 1% sample of all households based on the last population census

dataAccs.notes: To access the files, users need to log in and click on "Request Access". AUSSDA will then contact you for more information.
Terms of use agreement for Microcensus LFS data by Statistics Austria
